description: dotnet - The generic driver for the .NET CLI.

root.name: build
tip: Builds a .NET application.

root.name: build-server
tip: Interacts with servers started by a build.

root.name: clean
tip: Clean build outputs.

root.name: exec
tip: Runs a .NET application.

root.name: help
tip: Shows more detailed documentation online for the command.

root.name: msbuild
tip: Provides access to the MSBuild command line.

root.name: new
tip: Initializes a C# or F# project for a given template.

root.name: pack
tip: Creates a NuGet package of your code.

root.name: publish
tip: Publishes a .NET framework-dependent or self-contained application.

root.name: restore
tip: Restores the dependencies for a given application.

root.name: run
tip: Runs the application from source.

root.name: sdk
tip: .NET command for SDK.

next.name: check
tip: Shows up-to-date status of installed SDK and Runtime versions.

root.name: sln
tip: Options to add, remove, and list projects in a solution file.

root.name: store
tip: Stores assemblies in the runtime package store.

root.name: test
tip: Runs tests using a test runner.

root.name: reference
tip: .NET commands for manipulate project reference

next.name: add
tip: Adds a project reference.

next.name: list
tip: Lists project references.

next.name: remove
tip: Removes a project reference.

root.name: package
tip: .NET commands for managing NuGet package.

next.name: add
tip: Adds a NuGet package.

next.name: list
tip: Lists NuGet packages.

next.name: remove
tip: Removes a NuGet package.

next.name: search
tip: Searches for a NuGet package.

root.name: nuget
tip: .NET commands for managing NuGet package manager.

next.name: delete
tip: Deletes or unlists a package from the server.

next.name: push
tip: Pushes a package to the server and publishes it.

next.name: locals
tip: Clears or lists local NuGet resources such as http-request cache, temporary cache, or machine-wide global packages folder.

next.name: add
tip: Adds a NuGet source.

next.name: disable
tip: Disables a NuGet source.

next.name: enable
tip: Enables a NuGet source.

next.name: list
tip: Lists all configured NuGet sources.

next.name: remove
tip: Removes a NuGet source.

next.name: update
tip: Updates a NuGet source.

root.name: workload
tip: Install or use workloads that extend the .NET experience.

next.name: clean
tip: Removes workload components.

next.name: config
tip: Enables or disables workload-set update mode.

next.name: history
tip: Shows all workload installation actions.

next.name: install
tip: Installs an optional workload.

next.name: list
tip: Lists all installed workloads.

next.name: repair
tip: Repairs all installed workloads.

next.name: restore
tip: Restore workloads required for a project.

next.name: search
tip: List selected workloads or all available workloads.

next.name: uninstall
tip: Uninstalls a workload.

next.name: update
tip: Reinstalls all installed workloads.

root.name: tool
tip: Install or use tools that extend the .NET experience.
Tools are console applications that are installed from NuGet packages and are invoked from the command prompt.
You can write tools yourself or install tools written by third parties.

next.name: install
tip: Installs a tool on your machine.

next.name: list
tip: Lists all global, tool-path, or local tools currently installed on your machine.

next.name: search
tip: Searches NuGet.org for tools that have the specified search term in their name or metadata.

next.name: uninstall
tip: Uninstalls a tool from your machine.

next.name: update
tip: Updates a tool that is installed on your machine.

options.name: --info
tip: Prints out detailed information about a .NET installation and the machine environment,
such as the current operating system, and commit SHA of the .NET version.

options.name: --version
tip: Prints out the version of the .NET SDK used by dotnet commands.
It may be affected by a global.json file.
Available only when the SDK is installed.

options.name: --list-runtimes
tip: Prints out a list of the installed .NET runtimes for the architecture of the invoked dotnet.

options.name: --list-sdks
tip: Prints out a list of the installed .NET SDKs for the architecture of the invoked dotnet.

options.name: --help
tip: Prints out a list of available commands.

common_options.name: --diagnostics
tip: Enables diagnostic output.

common_options.name: --verbosity
tip: Sets the verbosity level of the command.
Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed], and diag[nostic].
Not supported in every command.

common_options.name: --help
tip: Prints out documentation for a given command.

common_options.name: --additionalprobingpath
tip: Path containing probing policy and assemblies to probe.
Repeat the option to specify multiple paths.

common_options.name: --additional-deps
tip: Path to an additional .deps.json file.
A deps.json file contains a list of dependencies, compilation dependencies,
and version information used to address assembly conflicts.

common_options.name: --roll-forward
tip: Controls how roll forward is applied to the app.
The SETTING can be one of the following values.
If not specified, Minor is the default.
[LatestPatch|Minor|Major|LatestMinor|LatestMajor|Disable]

common_options.name: --fx-version
tip: Version of the .NET runtime to use to run the application.
